title: Database Design
longDescription: Every app needs to store data somewhere — user accounts, posts, orders, settings. A database is that somewhere, and how you organize it determines whether your app is fast and reliable or slow and buggy. Think of it like a filing cabinet -- if you toss papers in randomly you'll never find anything, but with labeled folders and a clear system, retrieval is instant. This course teaches you to think about data: how to structure tables, create relationships between them, write queries to get data back, and evolve your database as your app grows with migrations.
